description: Extract generated horizontal row strips into 192x208 sprite frames: remove the chroma-key background, slice each strip into its per-state frame count (component-based with slot fallback), and write a frames-manifest.
rules: local-only — reads decoded strips, writes per-state frame PNGs + a manifest
DECODED_DIR holds <state>.png strips (e.g. idle.png with 6 slots); STATES selects rows (default all)
chroma key read from <DECODED_DIR>/../pet_request.json or defaults to #00FF00; frames + frames-manifest.json written under record_store/frames
usage: Set DECODED_DIR (dir of <state>.png strips); optionally STATES (e.g. idle or all). Output: frames/frames-manifest.json and frames/<state>/NN.png.
limitation: Only processes states whose strips are present; missing strips error out (porter degrades to a placeholder manifest). Requires Pillow (PIL).
